SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-13-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FAHEY, JAMES IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT AC ENTERPRISES C/O ANDREW CHEKENE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
